lessons.title: Guest Speaker
topics: zIdentify a retired council employee or any senior citizen with information on
how councils used to operate in the past. Invite him or her or take the learners
to him or her to share the history of local government in Zambia.
zPut learners in groups to discuss what they gathered from the presentation or
field visit and make group presentation.

Under the current Local Government Act, City and Municipal Councils are headed
by Mayors while District Councils are administered by Council Chairpersons
together with Ward Councillors as Decision Makers.
assessment: Read the following passage and answer question 1.
You have been tasked to review council records relating to council operations from
colonial times to the present. Through the review you discover that with passage of
time the law governing councils has undergone several reforms.
(a) Write an essay on the evolution of councils in Zambia from colonial days to
(b) Analyse the factors which led to local government reforms in Zambia.
